creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Remove patches from devel/gdb that are no longer needed.  At least, I found that on HEAD amd64 and 10.0 i386 and amd64 I did not need these patches for the port to build.

D       files/patch-bfd-elf32-nds32.c
D       files/patch-bfd-elf64-alpha.c
D       files/patch-opcodes-cr16-opc.c
D       files/patch-opcodes-crx-opc.c
